decision: Keep release authority disabled pending proof of the exact repository, main ref, hgi-304-v1 epoch, token settings, and one version-PR operation.
evidenceRequired: Authenticated GitHub variable, Actions permission, token, workflow-run, and generated pull-request readback.
Exact source revision, target branch, operation, expiry, rollback identity, and postcondition receipt.
limitations: The repository records desired source only; HGI-309 owns authenticated setting and run readback.
nonClaims: No pull request, tag, publish, release, merge, deploy, token, or workflow run is claimed.
rollbackRevocation: Disable the epoch gate and close or revert only the identified generated version pull request under separate authority.
